text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
119 
IP_MH_DGNS_IND 
LABEL: 
Mental Health Diagnosis Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: Indicator that identifies if diagnosis code on claim is related to mental health care. 
SHORT NAME: IP_MH_DGNS_IND 
LONG NAME: IP_MH_DGNS_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims (derived) 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
VALUES: 
0 = Not a mental health (MH) claim 
1 = MH claim
